message:
Add dispose methods for canvas memory cleanup in visualization

glyphAtlas.ts:
- Add dispose() method to release pixel memory
- Clear canvas contents and shrink to 1x1
- Handle both HTMLCanvasElement and OffscreenCanvas
- Clear glyph entries map and null out build reference

sequenceGridRenderer.ts:
- Add dispose() method to clean up renderer resources
- Null out source reference for garbage collection
- Clear canvas contents

rendererHost.ts:
- Call dispose() on renderer and atlas before nulling references
- Ensures proper cleanup of canvas resources on unmount

These methods should be called when components unmount to prevent
memory leaks from retained canvas pixel data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
